notes: Ground-truth exogenous events for DE trafic pilot. Pre-1991 = West Germany; reunification creates a structural break in all series.

events.label: German reunification
events.source: German reunification October 1990; statistical base enlarged to include East Germany

expected.O: level shift upward (base enlarged); then integration dip 1991-92
expected.R: possible dip (East DE had low R&D)
expected.S: possible increase post-unification — symbolic diffusion of West DE norms East

events.falsification_prediction: Level shift not reproduced by placebo at 1995 or 2000

events.label: Hartz IV / Agenda 2010 labour reform
events.source: Agenda 2010 announced March 2003; Hartz IV effective January 2005

expected.C: increase post-2003 — labour market reform as symbolic institutional shift

events.falsification_prediction: R/I acceleration not observed in placebo 1996-2000

events.label: Global Financial Crisis

expected.C: decrease or stagnate 2009; recovery 2010-11 if R rebounds

events.falsification_prediction: O shock absent in negative control 2002-2006

events.label: EV demand inflection + COVID
events.source: DE EV registrations tripled 2020 (subsidy increase + COVID incentives)

expected.S: acceleration — EV as symbolic green transport
expected.C: increase post-2020 if S diffusion is cumulative

events.falsification_prediction: S/C acceleration absent in 2013-2018 negative control
